calendar.selectHint: Click a day to add entries right away, or click and drag to select several days.

wizard.title: New worklog entries
wizard.noProjects: No projects configured — add them in settings.
wizard.multiTargetHint: This project logs to {{count}} Jiras — independent entries will be generated for each.
wizard.projectNotePlaceholder: e.g. mostly meetings and code review, log 2h chunks…
wizard.previewContextHint: Debug: show exactly what will be sent to the LLM
wizard.suggestionsInfo: Review and adjust the suggestions. Time is logged only after you confirm.
wizard.missingIssue: Fill in the issue for every entry.

settings.title: Settings
settings.connectionsHint: Each connection is one Jira instance with its own Tempo token. Active connections are toggled on the calendar screen.
settings.projectInstructionPlaceholder: e.g. only log to Task issues, descriptions in English…
settings.projectRequired: Every project needs a name, a connection and a matched Jira project.
settings.customFieldsHint: Fields map to Tempo work attributes and are attached to every logged entry. Import them from the API or add manually. Auto-filled fields are set by the LLM; everything can be edited before logging.
settings.fieldInstructionPlaceholder: e.g. set only when the work concerned a production incident…
settings.fieldRequired: Every field needs a connection, a key and a label.
settings.enableThinkingHint: Turning it off speeds up generation and saves tokens at some matching-quality cost. Applies to the Claude CLI and OpenAI reasoning models (gpt-5*, o*); the Copilot CLI does not expose this option.
settings.issuePoolHint: How many existing Jira issues (updated within the given period) are sent to the LLM as candidates for logging time.
settings.additionalInstructionsPlaceholder: E.g. use past tense, avoid abbreviations, always append the issue number…
settings.additionalInstructionsHint: Optional. Appended to the built-in prompt and treated as overriding the default rules.
settings.updateManualOnly: On this platform (unsigned build) updates are manual — we'll show a link to download the new version.

projects.hint: A project combines a name, one or more Jira projects (e.g. the client's Jira and the company Jira), optional repositories (each with its commit-author filter) and a standing LLM instruction. When generating entries you pick which projects you worked on.
projects.colorHint: Calendar entries of this project are tinted with this color
projects.noConnections: Add a Jira connection in settings first.
projects.jiraTargetsHint: If you log the same time in several Jiras (e.g. the client's and your company's), add several rows — independent entries are generated for each Jira with its own issues.
projects.foldersHint: Attach the local git repositories you commit to for this project. The app reads your recent commit messages (never the code) and sends them to the LLM as context, so the generated worklog descriptions match what you actually did. Optional — leave empty to describe the work from your notes only.
projects.archiveHint: Archiving keeps this project's color and name on past entries but hides it from the "worked on" picker, so no new time can be logged to it.
projects.archivedHint: Archived: still colors past entries, but you can no longer log time to it. Restore it to log again.
projects.invalidHint: Every project needs a name and at least one Jira project (connection + key); every repository needs an author e-mail or "Include everyone's commits".

funnyLoading: Convincing the model you actually worked…
Asking Jira about the meaning of life…
Negotiating estimates with the scrum master…
Looking for commits from Friday, 3 PM…
Translating 'fix typo' into a quarterly achievement…
Waking the model from a nap…
Pretending the daily took only 15 minutes…
Finding out who 'someone' was supposed to be…
Checking if it's the cache… (it's always the cache)

errors.JIRA_AUTH: Jira rejected the credentials. Check the e-mail and API token.
errors.GIT_NOT_A_REPO: The selected folder is not a git repository.
errors.LLM_AUTH_EXPIRED: The LLM session expired. Please log in again.
errors.LLM_CLI_NOT_FOUND: CLI tool not found. Check the path in settings.
errors.LLM_BAD_RESPONSE: The model returned a malformed response. Try again.
errors.claudeLoginStarted: A terminal was opened — finish logging in and retry.
